scripts.server:dev: cd apps/api && npm install && npm run dev
scripts.server:build: cd apps/api && npm install && npm run build
scripts.expo:dev: cd apps/mobile && npm install && npx expo start --web --port 8081
scripts.expo:static:build: cd apps/mobile && npm install && npx expo export --platform web --output-dir ../../dist
scripts.setup: npm install && cd apps/api && npm install && cd ../mobile && npm install
